Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Per Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Oct-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. REBECCA CUSHMAN UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF ATTY. RAQULE FOX APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING- THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE. ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER AT 10:00 A.M. ATTY. WHITMAN IS STILL NOT PRESENT IN COURT ALTHOUGH HE GAVE NOTICE TO THE PLAINTIFF THAT HE IS CONTESTING THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : PLAINTIFF LEON BIVINS Motion To Enforce Settlement Per C C P SECTION 664.6 IS GRANTED. THE AGREEMENT SATISFIES THE REQUIREMENTS OF C C P SECTION 664.6. REASONABLE FEES AND COSTS TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $790.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
